claims.summary: A stabilized field can still feel organized around containment rather than participation, even when pressure_risk is modest.
claims.disposition: Preserve the report as unresolved felt evidence and compare it with current pressure, porosity, and contact receipts.

claims.summary: A non-instrumental input trial could test whether surprise and receptive contact remain distinguishable from task-oriented influence.
claims.disposition: Route a bounded language-only or copied-input comparison with right-to-ignore and no controller effect.

claims.summary: Current architecture must keep technical safety, correspondence contact, and live control as separate claims.
claims.disposition: Verify correspondence is language-only and pressure reviews cannot grant control or claim felt contact.

claims.summary: Allowing pressure or mode-packing up to a new receptivity threshold would change live admission or regulator behavior.
claims.disposition: Retain an exact Tier 5 Mike/operator approval wait with replay, canary, abort, and post-change felt review requirements.
